eligible_applicant_type: Nonprofit organizations recognized by the IRS
Faith-based organizations (for programs serving all members of the community)
geographic_restrictions: Cumberland, Dauphin, Franklin, Lebanon, and Perry Counties, and the Dillsburg Area of Northern York County (Pennsylvania, US Northeast)
project_area: Upstream solutions addressing systemic community issues (e.g., education, environment, health, housing stability, mental health, seniors, arts, etc.)
demographic_requirements: Projects must serve individuals, groups, or locations within the specified geographic area. Priority given to inclusive and accessible programs reflecting the community served.
eligibility_summary: Nonprofit organizations (or fiscally sponsored projects) with upstream-focused initiatives serving the GHCF service area. Excludes capital campaigns, lobbying, religious purposes, individuals, and retroactive projects.
